phrases.text_local: Dove si trova la Torre Medicea?
phrases.pronunciation: DOH-veh see TROH-vah lah TOR-reh meh-dee-CHAY-ah

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono bagni pubblici vicino alla piazza, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOOzee chee SOHnoh BAHnyee poobBLEEchee veeCHEEnoh AHluh PYAHtsuh pehr fahVOHreh

responses.english: Yes, there are some inside Palazzo Madama, nearby here.
responses.phonetic: SÌ CHEE SOH-noh DEHNT-roh pah-LAHTS-tsoh mah-DAH-mah KW-ee vee-CHEE-noh
responses.french: Sì, ci sono dentro Palazzo Madama, qui vicino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Royal Palace is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Palazzo Reale di Torino?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel pah-LAHT-tsoh reh-AH-leh dee toh-REE-noh?

responses.english: On the north side of the square, with the Galleria Sabauda.
responses.phonetic: sool LAH-toh nord DEL-lah PYAHT-tsah, kon lah gal-leh-REE-ah sah-BOW-dah.
responses.french: Sul lato nord della piazza, con la Galleria Sabauda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Egyptian Museum is
phrases.cultural_note: Turin's Egyptian Museum is the world's second largest collection of Egyptian artefacts after Cairo.

responses.english: On Via Accademia delle Scienze, ten minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah ak-kah-DEH-myah DEL-leh SHEN-tseh, ah DYEH-chee mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee.
responses.french: In Via Accademia delle Scienze, a dieci minuti a piedi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the Palazzo Madama is

responses.english: It's Turin's municipal museum of ancient art, on the square.
responses.phonetic: eh eel moo-ZEH-oh dee AR-teh an-TEE-kah del koh-MOO-neh dee toh-REE-noh, een PYAHT-tsah.
responses.french: È il museo di arte antica del comune di Torino, in piazza.
